## Summary

What does this PR change, and why?

## Related issue

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / chore
- [ ] Documentation

## Checklist

- [ ] **CodeRabbit review** complete (or maintainer review) — see [docs/PR_REVIEW.md](docs/PR_REVIEW.md)
- [ ] Review feedback addressed; **all conversations resolved**
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run test:ci` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or real member/payment data included
- [ ] Tests added/updated for behavior changes
- [ ] Docs updated if needed

## Notes for reviewers

Anything reviewers should focus on or be aware of.
